Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.Time

    • Uses of Time in com.irurueta.units

      Methods in com.irurueta.units that return Time 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Time Time.addAndReturnNew​(double value, TimeUnit unit, TimeUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided time value and unit and returns a new time instance using provided unit.
      static Time Time.addAndReturnNew​(Time arg1, Time arg2, TimeUnit unit)
      Adds two time instances.
      Time Time.addAndReturnNew​(Time t, TimeUnit unit)
      Adds provided time to current instance and returns a new time instance.
      Time Time.addAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, TimeUnit unit, TimeUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided time value and unit and returns a new time instance using provided unit.
      static Time TimeConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(Time input, TimeUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a time to requested output unit.
      Time TimeFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine a time value and unit.
      private Time TimeFormatter.parse1stCentury​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as 1st century format.
      private Time TimeFormatter.parse2ndCentury​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as 2nd century format.
      private Time TimeFormatter.parse3rdCentury​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as 3rd century format.
      private Time TimeFormatter.parseCentury​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as n-th century format.
      private Time TimeFormatter.parseDay​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as day format.
      private Time TimeFormatter.parseHour​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as hour format.
      Time TimeFormatter.parseHourMinute​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses provided string representation using hour and minute format (hh:mm).
      Time TimeFormatter.parseHourMinuteSecond​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses provided string representation using hour, minute and second format (hh:mm:ss).
      private Time TimeFormatter.parseMicrosecond​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as microsecond format.
      private Time TimeFormatter.parseMillisecond​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as millisecond format.
      private Time TimeFormatter.parseMinute​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as minute format.
      private Time TimeFormatter.parseMonth​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as month format.
      Time TimeFormatter.parseMultiple​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses a string containing multiple units and returns the summation of all found values as a single Time instance.
      private Time TimeFormatter.parseNanosecond​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as nanosecond format.
      private Time TimeFormatter.parseSecond​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as second format.
      private Time TimeFormatter.parseWeek​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as week format.
      private Time TimeFormatter.parseYear​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses string as year format.
      Time Time.subtractAndReturnNew​(double value, TimeUnit unit, TimeUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided time value and unit and returns a new time instance using provided unit.
      static Time Time.subtractAndReturnNew​(Time arg1, Time arg2, TimeUnit unit)
      Subtracts two time instances.
      Time Time.subtractAndReturnNew​(Time t, TimeUnit unit)
      Subtracts provided time to current instance and returns a new instance.
      Time Time.subtractAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, TimeUnit unit, TimeUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided time value and unit and returns a new time instance using provided unit.
      Methods in com.irurueta.units with parameters of type Time 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void Time.add​(Time time)
      Adds provided time and updates current time instance.
      void Time.add​(Time t, Time result)
      Adds provided time and stores the result into provided time instance.
      static void Time.add​(Time arg1, Time arg2, Time result)
      Adds two time instances and stores the result into provided instance.
      static Time Time.addAndReturnNew​(Time arg1, Time arg2, TimeUnit unit)
      Adds two time instances.
      Time Time.addAndReturnNew​(Time t, TimeUnit unit)
      Adds provided time to current instance and returns a new time instance.
      static void TimeConverter.convert​(Time input, Time output)
      Converts a time to provided output time unit.
      static void TimeConverter.convert​(Time time, TimeUnit outputUnit)
      Converts and updates a time to requested output unit.
      static void TimeConverter.convert​(Time input, TimeUnit outputUnit, Time result)
      Converts a time to requested output unit.
      static Time TimeConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(Time input, TimeUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a time to requested output unit.
      java.lang.String TimeFormatter.formatHourMinute​(Time time)
      Formats time instance using hour and minute format (hh:mm.ms).
      java.lang.String TimeFormatter.formatHourMinuteSecond​(Time time)
      Formats this instance using hour, minute and second format (hh:mm::ss.ms).
      java.lang.String TimeFormatter.formatMultiple​(Time time, int flags)
      Formats provided time instance using required units as flags.
      java.lang.String TimeFormatter.formatMultiple​(Time time, int flags, boolean onlyNonZero)
      Formats provided time instance using required units as flags.
      void Time.subtract​(Time time)
      Subtract provided time and updates current time.
      void Time.subtract​(Time t, Time result)
      Subtracts provided time and stores the result into provided time.
      static void Time.subtract​(Time arg1, Time arg2, Time result)
      Subtracts two time instances and stores the result into provided instance.
      static Time Time.subtractAndReturnNew​(Time arg1, Time arg2, TimeUnit unit)
      Subtracts two time instances.
      Time Time.subtractAndReturnNew​(Time t, TimeUnit unit)
      Subtracts provided time to current instance and returns a new instance.
